name: Feature request

title: "[Feature] "

---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve, or what workflow does it improve?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Screenshots, diagrams, or links to related issues / PRs.
